---
title: "create_incremental.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/create_incremental.py"
loc: 94
complexity: 5
logic_score: 3.73
style_score: 3.78
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.38
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating generate_cases.

## Interaction Protocol
Import generate_cases and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 19 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [random](file://random)
- [sys](file://sys)

### Exports
- `generate_cases`
